channels.name: Rod Miller AI (Uncle Rod)
channels.notes: GenX IT veteran 30 years. Mon/Thu AI news, Wed agent guide for employed professionals. Strong ICP fit — same audience, same voice register as Randy. Cap at 10 videos to weight toward recent Wednesday teaching content.

channels.name: IT Project Managers
channels.notes: Project Manager AI workflows — Jira, Confluence, Atlassian. Employed professional ICP, real enterprise toolstack. Strong fit for knowledge worker pain point research.

channels.name: Wes Roth
channels.notes: AI implications and preparation — calm, accessible tone. 'Don't Panic' framing aligns with ICP fear of irrelevance. Strong fit.

channels.name: Mark Savant
channels.notes: AI layoff news channel — 'AI Takeover' framing covers every major enterprise layoff (Microsoft, Oracle, Amazon, Cisco, Meta). Comments are ICP in real-time panic mode. Cap at 20 to avoid older unrelated content.

channels.name: Duncan Rogoff | AI Automation
channels.notes: AI automation for social media content creation — practical workflow content for solo operators and small teams. Direct relevance to Randy's content marketing business.

channels.name: Sabrina Ramonov
channels.notes: AI tools and automation for content creators and solopreneurs. LinkedIn content strategy, creator workflows. Previously analyzed 5 transcripts Apr 2026 — strong fit for content marketing research.

channels.name: AI Savvy CEO
channels.notes: Tim George — AI side hustles, automation businesses, faceless YouTube, digital products. Tests methods himself, step-by-step. Study for: AI avatar usage, content production pipeline, how he structures teaching content with AI tools.

channels.name: Tim Talks Finance
channels.notes: 25-yr mortgage finance veteran. Bitcoin, housing market, Fed, inflation, national debt, retirement — for people who want to understand the financial system. Study for: script flow, how a practitioner-as-creator packages deep domain expertise for a non-expert audience using AI production.

channels.name: Julia McCoy
channels.notes: First Movers founder — AI clone channel (AI avatar + AI-generated scripts). Non-hype AI news for career/job impact, AGI, post-labor economics. Study for: AI avatar implementation, how she replaced production skills with AI tools, content creation workflow at scale.

notes: ICP pivot May 1 2026 — primary audience is employed professionals 35-55, not job seekers or developers. Run pain point analysis with --group ai-and-claude-code for primary ICP research. career-and-job-search and developer-technical preserved for reference.
